info.title: charon
info.description:
Charon is a powerful game development tool that streamlines the game development process. It provides a structured approach to designing and modeling game data, with automatic source code generation that reduces the load on programmers and eliminates human errors.
			# Online version: https://charon.live
			# Website: https://www.gamedevware.com/
			# Documentation https://gamedevware.github.io/charon/

commands.name: INIT
commands.description: Initialize a new, empty game data file at the specified path.

options.name: --fileName
options.description:
Path to the game data file to initialize. The file must not e
xist or must be empty. Example: `c:/mygamedata.json` or `/var
/mygame/gamedata.json`.

commands.name: MCP
commands.description:
Start an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for AI assistant i
ntegration via stdio.
